name: Copy Paste
description: Copy and paste pieces of your network. Drag a box to select a stretch of track, copy it, then paste a translated copy anywhere on the map — track, parallel/quad groups, stations, and crossover-ready geometry all come along. Pasted pieces drop as blueprints so you can review and build them with the game's own Build button. A fast way to duplicate stations, junctions, or whole line segments instead of redrawing them by hand.
